nasb.text: There were also many burnt offerings with the fat of the peace offerings and with the libations for the burnt offerings. Thus the service of the house of the Lord was established again.

esv.text: Besides the great number of burnt offerings, there was the fat of the peace offerings, and there were the drink offerings for the burnt offerings. Thus the service of the house of the Lord was restored.

cnv.text: 此外，還有很多燔祭牲和平安祭牲的脂肪，以及和燔祭同獻的奠祭很多。這樣，耶和華殿裡的事奉就重新恢復了。

ccb.text: 他们献上大量的燔祭，以及很多平安祭祭牲的脂肪和与燔祭同献的奠祭。 从此，耶和华殿里的事奉恢复了。
